summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the Logix Finance static NBFC site. All 15 routes load (200) with header/footer. Header nav, mobile menu, footer (5 main + 10 policy links), CTAs to /loan-products, Contact form (submit disabled until consent, success on submit), Policy TOC with scroll-spy, ScrollToTop on route change, placeholders, fonts, and color palette all working. No console/page errors detected on any page.
critical_code_review_comments: PolicyLayout scroll-spy uses a single rectTop<140 threshold; when user scrolls past the LAST section heading rapidly via TOC anchor click, the 'active' computation can briefly lag (observed last TOC item not turning terracotta within 800ms post-click). Not a functional bug but a minor UX polish; consider IntersectionObserver or using the in-view section with rectTop<140 AND rectBottom>0.

Header/Footer brand block has hard-coded color hex values throughout (e.g., #1A2421, #B85C38). For maintainability these should be wired into Tailwind theme tokens (already exist in design tokens) instead of inline arbitrary-value classes.

All 15 pages share an identical <title> 'Logix Finance & Investment | Simple, Transparent Lending'. For SEO/accessibility, each route (especially the 10 policy pages) should have a unique <title> via react-helmet-async or a small effect setting document.title.
Contact form has no client-side validation messages beyond HTML5 required attribute; mobile/email patterns are not enforced. Acceptable for a static placeholder build but worth noting.

All anchor links in TOC use plain <a href='#id'> which causes the browser to update the URL hash and rely on default jump; this works (smooth-scroll via CSS likely), but consider e.preventDefault + scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}) for consistent UX across browsers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is purely static; Contact form is local-state only (sets sent=true for 4s). Placeholders 'xxxxxxxx' rendered with .ph class (monospace + muted bg) are INTENTIONAL — do not flag as bugs. Frontend URL: https://capital-connect-79.preview.emergentagent.com. All 15 routes verified including /policies/*. Data-testids are present on all interactive elements (nav-*, mobile-nav-*, footer-*, enquiry-*, toc-*, header-apply-btn, mobile-apply-btn, site-header, site-footer, policy-layout, enquiry-form, enquiry-submit, enquiry-success, enquiry-consent, map-placeholder).

test_results_detail.routes_loaded: 15/15 (200 OK, header+footer rendered, no page errors)
test_results_detail.header_nav_desktop: 5/5 nav links route correctly; active state color = rgb(184,92,56) terracotta confirmed
test_results_detail.mobile_menu: Toggle opens menu (viewport 390); mobile-nav-* links navigate; menu auto-closes on route change (confirmed in re-test)
test_results_detail.footer: 5 main links + 10 policy links present and correct
test_results_detail.ctas_to_loan_products: 8 anchors found on Home pointing to /loan-products
test_results_detail.loan_products_page: All 4 products (Personal/Business/Consumer/Short-Term) visible with LOAN AMOUNT, TENURE, INTEREST RATE, REPRESENTATIVE APR, PROCESSING FEE, DISBURSAL, ELIGIBILITY, DOCUMENTS sections
test_results_detail.how_it_works: Page renders; 'Cooling-off', 'KFS', 'Key Fact' callouts all present
test_results_detail.contact_form: Submit disabled initially=true, disabled before consent=true, enabled after consent=true, success message appears after submit
test_results_detail.policy_toc_scrollspy: 7 TOC links on /policies/fair-practices-code; clicking scrolls page (0->2246px); scroll-spy active class engages on most sections (minor lag for very-last section after rapid anchor click)
test_results_detail.scroll_to_top: Verified: scrolled from 2009 -> 0 on route change
test_results_detail.placeholders: 39 .ph elements on Home; font-family monospace (ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo,...) confirmed
test_results_detail.color_palette: Generic blue audit: 0 elements with generic blue colors detected on Home
test_results_detail.page_errors: 0 page errors / 0 console errors across tested pages
